message:
feat(manifest): validate connect_timeout_ms <= total_timeout_ms

NetworkConstraints::validate() now rejects configurations where the
connect timeout exceeds the total request timeout — a nonsensical
setting that previously would have let the connect phase alone consume
the entire budget.

Also add two unit tests:
- reject-mismatch: connect_timeout_ms > total_timeout_ms returns Err
- accept-equal: connect_timeout_ms == total_timeout_ms returns Ok

Pure additive hardening; no existing logic changed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
